languages.text: {n}Об их успехе возвестили появившиеся Погонщицы, одна за другой устремившиеся к гробнице поганых ксеносов. И вид торчащих из щелей и входов руин отростков тварей знаменовал искупление, которую купили немногие для всех остальных.{/n}

{n}The Drovers' appearance heralded the squad's victory, as they rushed one after another toward the tomb of the foul xenos. The sight of the creatures' growths protruding from the crevices and entrances of the ruins signalled the atonement that the few had bought for the rest.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Об их успехе возвестили появившиеся Погонщицы, одна за другой устремившиеся к гробнице поганых ксеносов. И вид торчащих из щелей и входов руин отростков тварей знаменовал искупление, которую купили немногие для всех остальных.{/n}

{n}The Drovers' appearance heralded the squad's victory, as they rushed one after another toward the tomb of the foul xenos. The sight of the creatures' growths protruding from the crevices and entrances of the ruins signalled the freedom that the few had bought for the rest.{/n}

{n}The Drovers' appearance heralded the squad's victory, as they rushed one after another toward the tomb of the foul xenos. The sight of the creatures' growths protruding from the crevices and entrances of the ruins signalled the freedom that the few had bought for the rest.{/n}

{n}The Drovers' appearance heralded the squad's victory, as they rushed one after another toward the tomb of the foul xenos. The sight of the creatures' growths protruding from the crevices and entrances of the ruins signalled the atonement that the few had bought for the rest.{/n}

languages.text: {n}ドルーバーの出現は、その部隊の勝利を告げるものだった。彼らは悪しき異種族の墓へと次々と向かっていく。その姿は、生き残った者たちのために、わずかな者たちが勝ち取った自由を象徴していた。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The Drovers' appearance heralded the squad's victory, as they rushed one after another toward the tomb of the foul xenos. The sight of the creatures' growths protruding from the crevices and entrances of the ruins signalled the freedom that the few had bought for the rest.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}ドロウバーズの出現は、その部隊の勝利を告げるものだった。彼らは悪しき異種族の墓へと次々と向かっていく。その姿は、生き残った者たちのために、わずかな者たちが勝ち取った自由を象徴していた。{/n}

languages.text: {n}La llegada de los Pastores anunció la victoria del escuadrón. Entraron uno tras otro en la tumba de los inmundos xenos. Ver las protuberancias de las criaturas en las grietas y entradas de las ruinas fue una proclamación de la expiación que unos pocos habían comprado con sangre para los demás.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The Drovers' appearance heralded the squad's victory, as they rushed one after another toward the tomb of the foul xenos. The sight of the creatures' growths protruding from the crevices and entrances of the ruins signalled the atonement that the few had bought for the rest.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}La llegada de los Pastores anunció la victoria del escuadrón. Entraron uno tras otro en la tumba de los inmundos xenos. Ver las protuberancias de las criaturas en las grietas y entradas de las ruinas fue una proclamación de la expiación que unos pocos habían comprado con sangre para los demás.{/n}

languages.text: {n}拒生花的现身宣告了小队的胜利——它们前仆后继地涌向异形邪祟的墓穴。随后，拒生花增生体从遗迹裂隙与入口处挤出，象征着那少数人牺牲换来的赎罪。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The Drovers' appearance heralded the squad's victory, as they rushed one after another toward the tomb of the foul xenos. The sight of the creatures' growths protruding from the crevices and entrances of the ruins signalled the atonement that the few had bought for the rest.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}拒生花的现身宣告了小队的胜利——它们前仆后继地涌向异形邪祟的墓穴。随后，拒生花增生体从遗迹裂隙与入口处挤出，象征着那少数人牺牲换来的赎罪。{/n}

languages.text: {n}Die Ankunft der Treiber kündete vom Sieg des Trupps, als sie einer nach dem anderen auf die Gruft der Xenos zustürmten. Der Anblick der aus den Ritzen und Eingängen der Ruinen hervortretenden Auswüchse der Kreaturen besiegelte die Sühne, die einige wenige für den Rest erkauft hatten.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The Drovers' appearance heralded the squad's victory, as they rushed one after another toward the tomb of the foul xenos. The sight of the creatures' growths protruding from the crevices and entrances of the ruins signalled the atonement that the few had bought for the rest.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Die Ankunft der Treiber kündete vom Sieg des Trupps, als sie einer nach dem anderen auf die Gruft der Xenos zustürmten. Der Anblick der aus den Ritzen und Eingängen der Ruinen hervortretenden Auswüchse der Kreaturen besiegelte die Sühne, die einige wenige für den Rest erkauft hatten.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Çobanların ortaya çıkışı, manganın zaferini müjdeledi. Canavarlar birbiri ardına iğrenç zenoların mezarına doğru hücum etti. Harabelerin yarıklarından ve girişlerinden dışarı fırlayan canavarların urlarının görüntüsü, azınlığın geri kalanlar için satın aldığı kefaret sinyaliydi.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The Drovers' appearance heralded the squad's victory, as they rushed one after another toward the tomb of the foul xenos. The sight of the creatures' growths protruding from the crevices and entrances of the ruins signalled the atonement that the few had bought for the rest.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Çobanların ortaya çıkışı, manganın zaferini müjdeledi. Canavarlar birbiri ardına iğrenç zenoların mezarına doğru hücum etti. Harabelerin yarıklarından ve girişlerinden dışarı fırlayan canavarların urlarının görüntüsü, azınlığın geri kalanlar için satın aldığı kefaret sinyaliydi.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Ce fut l'apparition des Chasseurs, qui se précipitèrent les uns après les autres dans le tombeau des immondes xénos, qui sonna la victoire de l'escouade. Les excroissances des créatures, qui dépassaient des crevasses et accès des ruines, annoncèrent l'expiation qu'une poignée d'hommes avait gagnée pour tous les autres.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The Drovers' appearance heralded the squad's victory, as they rushed one after another toward the tomb of the foul xenos. The sight of the creatures' growths protruding from the crevices and entrances of the ruins signalled the atonement that the few had bought for the rest.{/n}
